world.title: Toddler suffocated for ‘crying too much’ during family fight
world.description: A MAN suffocated his toddler to death after she "cried too much" during a family quarrel, Malaysia Nanban reported.

world.title: Iranian national arrested at LAX for trafficking arms to Sudan
world.description: Shamim Mafi, 44, was arrested at LAX for attempting to smuggle drones, bombs, and millions of rounds of ammunition to Sudan on behalf of Iran.

world.title: TAROM 737 Pilot Collapses Mid-Flight After Zero Sleep, Triggers Emergency
world.description: TAROM 737 pilot fatigue incident reveals risks after co-pilot collapse mid-flight due to zero sleep and safety gaps.

world.title: Five questions awaiting Starmer as he faces Commons over Mandelson scandal
world.description: The prime minister said he was "staggered" to find out last week that civil servants in the Foreign Office withheld information from him.

world.title: Iran vows to 'soon respond' after US hits cargo ship
world.description: Iran's military has vowed to respond after a US destroyer fired on an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman that tried to evade a US naval blockade.

world.title: Oil prices jump after US seizure of Iranian ship imperils talks
world.description: Brent crude jumped as much as 7.9 per cent, erasing most of its declines on April 17. Read more at straitstimes.com.

world.title: Middle East war live: Iran vows response after US destroyer fires on cargo ship
world.description: Iran vowed retaliation after a US destroyer fired on an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman on Sunday, as it was attempting to evade a US naval blockade. Tehran condemned the incident as “armed…

world.title: Agoda identifies Asia’s top shoppers
world.description: SINGAPORE, 20 April 2026: Digital travel platform Agoda’s latest data unveils which Asian travellers have shopping top-of-mind when planning trips.  Topping the ranking are travellers from Taiwan and South Korea, with nearly one in four (23%) respondents from each market saying shopping motivated their trips. Travellers from the Philippines (22%), Malaysia (20%) and Japan (15%) […]

business.title: DIRECTV Modernizes Its Satellite Television System
business.description: DIRECTV, one of the largest satellite television providers in the United States, is upgrading its main video delivery platform. The company is implementing new software from Harmonic, a technology firm listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker HLIT. The upgrade uses Harmonic’s VOS Media Software, described as cloud-native. This software now powers the […]

business.title: Generative AI may help scientists connect the many layers of cancer
business.description: A Cell Perspective argues that generative AI models could help tackle cancer’s multiscale, multimodal complexity by complementing the Hallmarks of Cancer framework. It proposes that models capable of complex pattern recognition, multimodal fusion, and contextual reasoning could improve cancer detection, biological discovery, and precision oncology, while still requiring rigorous validation and human oversight.

business.title: LIVESTREAMED: BoG Governor holds roundtable discussion on Remit 2 Invest
business.description: The Governor of the Bank of Ghana, Dr Johnson Pandit Asiama, is hosting a team of experts at a high-level roundtable known as “The Central Bank Bridge: Remit2Invest.”

business.title: Soy sauce prices to increase
business.description: SOY sauce will cost more due to increasing costs triggered by the US-Iran conflict, China Press reported.

business.title: Self-reliance over romance
business.description: IN an age where heartbreak is increasingly laid bare on social media, actress Fasha Sandha (pic) is striking a tone grounded less in romance and more in realism, reported Harian Metro.

business.title: Oil prices rise anew amid a US-Iran standoff in the Strait of Hormuz
business.description: Oil prices are rising in early trading as a standoff between Iran and the U.S. prevented tankers from using the Strait of Hormuz.

business.title: Aussie home buyers sabotaging loans with everyday splurges
business.description: They want a quarter-acre dream on a part-time sacrifice. From oat lattes to Uber Eats, are Aussie Millennials and Gen Z pricing themselves out?

business.title: Nigeria Exports Crude as Dangote Refinery Faces Shortage
business.description: Nigeria's crude oil exports remain high while the Dangote refinery faces a critical crude shortage, receiving only a fraction of its needed domestic supply

science.title: Alien comet reveals hidden layers after close brush with the Sun
science.description: An interstellar comet changed its chemistry after passing the Sun, revealing hidden layers and a surprising mix of carbon dioxide and water.

science.title: Particle pairs in superconductors show unexpected behavior
science.description: Scientists reveal how pairs interact in superconductors and discover an unexpected quantum pattern that challenges current theories.

science.description: Researchers at the University of Rochester have discovered why oxygen-rich surface waters produce methane, a mystery that has intrigued science for years. The answer lies in bacteria that decompose organic matter when phosphate is lacking. With ocean warming reducing nutrient mixing, methane production may increase, creating a cycle of [...]

science.title: Zebra finch neurons offer new clues about learning, repair, and human brain limits
science.description: Zebra finch neurons appear to tunnel through adult brain tissue, offering clues about learning, repair, and human brain limits.

science.title: Greek Scientist Plays Key Role in Historic Artemis Mission
science.description: Greek scientist Periklis Papadopoulos plays key role in NASA’s Artemis II mission to the Moon.

ai.title: Mark Zuckerberg to Axe 10 Percent of Meta’s Workforce in May as AI Bloodbath Deepens
ai.description: Meta plans to cut about 8,000 jobs next month, roughly 10 pereccent of its workforce, as it ramps up investment in artificial intelligence.

ai.title: Intel Nova Lake leak is all about one thing: absurd amounts of cache
ai.description: Intel Nova Lake leak reveals up to 288MB cache, 52-core CPUs, and major upgrades aimed at challenging AMD’s gaming and AI performance lead.

ai.title: In a Word ... Doom
ai.description: To date, we’ve survived radio, the car, the gramophone, and TV – I have every confidence we will survive AI

ai.title: Human Rights in the Realm of Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: Ashok Bhan ashokbhan@rediffmail.com The rapid expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) has ushered in a transformative era, redefining economies, governance, and social interactions. While AI promises efficiency, innovation, and unprecedented analytical capabilities, it simultaneously raises profound questions about the protection and evolution of human rights. The intersection of AI and human rights is no longer theoretical-it is a pressing global concern that requires principled frameworks, ethical foresight, and regulatory vigilance. At its core, the human rights discourse around AI is anchored […]

ai.title: AI cameras to drive traffic enforcement across 500 spots in city
ai.description: Pune Police will expand AI-based traffic enforcement to 500 locations, using real-time cameras for automatic challans to improve compliance and reduce congestion.

ai.title: AI cameras to drive traffic enforcement across 500 spots in city
ai.description: Pune Police to expand AI traffic enforcement with 500 cameras for real-time violation detection, aiming for 99% automatic challans to improve road safety.

ai.title: Govt imparts AI training to 2,500 artisans under PM Vishwakarma Scheme
ai.description: NEW DELHI, Apr 19 : The Ministry of Micro Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME) on Sunday said over 2,500 beneficiaries, including artisans and craftspeople, have been trained on the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools under the PM Vishwakarma Scheme to improve their livelihoods and business potential. The initiative aligns with the vision of “AI for Social Good”, as emphasised by the Prime Minister during the IndiaAI Impact Summit and reflected in the Delhi Declaration, according to a statement. It […]
